title: Police launch manhunt for 3 Thembalethu gunmen
description: GEORGE NEWS - Thembalethu police launched a...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Thembalethu police launched a manhunt for three masked gunmen who allegedly shot and killed a man during a robbery on Monday night, 24 March.

The incident took place at about 20:00 when three armed men entered a shop in Zone 9, Thembalethu, demanding cash and cellphones.


> It is understood that the victim was ordered to come out from behind the counter and made to lie down on the floor while one of the gunmen ransacked the counter.


Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies said at some point a gunshot went off and the victim was shot in the stomach. The trio then hightailed it out of the shop with a cellphone and an undisclosed amount of cash.

The victim was taken to the George Hospital where he was declared dead on arrival.A case of murder and business robbery was opened.

No suspects have been arrested yet and the investigating officer urges anyone with information that could lead to the arrest of the assailants to contact the Thembalethu detectives on 044 802 8951 or Crime Stop on 08600 10111.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
